title: Sentinel APEX Intelligence Report: 9th March – Threat Intelligence Report

sections.executive_summary: This report covers 9th March – Threat Intelligence Report - a threat with risk score 10.0/10. Priority: P1_CRITICAL. CISA KEV confirms active exploitation. Affected sectors: Unknown.
